items.name: Dominus Empyreus
items.description: The first Dominus ever created. Symbol of the ultimate status.

items.name: Dominus Frigidus
items.description: Ice-themed hood designed by a contest winner.

items.name: Dominus Infernus
items.description: A dark, fire-themed hood with glowing red eyes.

items.name: Dominus Astra
items.description: The only Dominus with a star/space animated texture.

items.name: Dominus Messor
items.description: Halloween-themed Dominus with a skeletal aesthetic.

items.name: Dominus Vespertilio
items.description: Features bat-like wings instead of traditional feathers.

items.name: Dominus Aureus
items.description: Pure gold version released for the 5th anniversary of the series.

items.name: Dominus Pittacium
items.description: Based on a paper/parchment theme. Only 3 exist in the world.

items.name: Dominus Rex
items.description: Royal themed with teal and gold accents.

items.name: Dominus Praefectus
items.description: Dark grey and white design inspired by Roman commanders.
